name: This is a Robery
description:
During the Rhino activation, he may spend 4 POWER to play this card.

Choose an enemy character within RANGE 1 that is holding Objective token. The chosen character drops any Objetive tokens it is holding. Rhino then Throws the chosen character MEDIUM.

name: Rhino in a China Shop
description:
Rhino may play this chard at the beggining of his Activation.

The next attack Rhino makes this Activation adds dice equal to the combined Size of all terrain features destroyed this Activation.

At the end of this Activation, Rhino suffers 2 WOUND.

name: A-Force Assemble!
description:
An A-Force character may spend 3 POWER to play this card.
When an allied character is defending against an attack this round, add 1 die to the defense roll for each other A-Force character within RANGE 2 of that character.

name: Well-Laid Plans
description:
Green Goblin and Doctor Octopus may spend 3 POWER each to play this card.

Roll 5 dice for each enemy character holding an objective token. The enemy character suffers one damage for each CRIT and WILD result rolled.

A character damaged in this way drops all objetive tokens it is holding. The player playing this card chooses the order in which enemy characters are affected.

name: Shadow Organization
description:
During the Power Phase, any number of allied Criminal Syndicate characters may spend 2 POWER each to play this card.

Enemy characters must be within RANGE 2 of characters that spend POWER to target them with attacks this Round.

name: All According to Plan
description:
During the Power Phase any number of allied Criminal Syndicate characters may spend POWER to play this card.

If 10 or more POWER was spent to play this card, take the Priority token.

name: Patch Up
description:
Choose a non-dazed allied character. Another allied character within RANGE 2 of the chosen character may spend up to 5 POWER to play this card.

Remove WOUND from the chosen character equal to the POWER spent to play this card.

name: Sacriface
description:
If an allied character is within RANGE 2 of another allied character and its targeted by an enemy attack, those allied characters may spend 1 POWER each to play this card.

The non-targeted allied character immediately becomes the new target of the attack regardless of range and LOS. It cannot add additional defense dice to its defense roll and cannot modify its dice during the attack.

name: Lethal Protector
description:
When an enemy character targets an allied character within RANGE 3 of an allied Venom with an attack, Venom may spend 2 POWER to play this card.

Place Venom within RANGE 1 of the allied character. Venom becomes the target of the attack regardless of range and LOS.
